_note: Baseline metrics snapshot the playtest skill diffs against (§13.2, #140). It is a snapshot of the --bot batch below on the commit named. It is SUPPOSED to drift: after any change expected to move the numbers (a tuning [START] knob, guard/vision/ability behaviour, generation, the bot policy itself), refresh it with the command below and commit the new snapshot in the same PR. A stale baseline compared silently is the anti-pattern this file exists to avoid.
